pageContext.name: Leliel: By the Hidden Sun
pageContext.description: Sideshow presents the Leliel: By The Hidden Sun Fine Art Print, a stunning and surreal original fantasy artwork by Peter Mohrbacher.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Leliel: By The Hidden Sun Fine Art Print shows Leliel, a Seraphim, cloaked in clear blue skies and swirling cosmos as she sits above the twisting vines of an infinite forest. A veil falls gracefully over her face and she stares pensively upon the world. At her waist, her black wings settle, resting even as waves of star-studded darkness flow around her floating form. This is the Angel of the Night, rising to meet the moon.  This breathtaking illustration is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Leliel: By The Hidden Sun Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium logo in the margin as part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this angelic fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Embrace the night when you bring home the Leliel: By The Hidden Sun Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher today.
